name: Property Valuation AI
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for property valuation narrative generation, comparable sale analysis, neighborhood scoring commentary, market trend interpretation, and appraisal report drafting

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Comparable property search — semantic matching by features, location, condition, and sale recency; neighborhood data retrieval; market report search

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Property records, comparable sales database, valuation history, neighborhood scores, market indices, appraiser notes

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for market analytics

services.name: Azure Machine Learning
services.purpose: Automated valuation models (AVM) — hedonic pricing, gradient boosting, and neural network models trained on sales history and property features

prod.note: DS3 v2 training, managed endpoints, batch scoring

enterprise.note: NC6s training, ensemble models, real-time endpoints

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Data ingestion pipelines — MLS feed processing, public records import, market index calculations, neighborhood score updates, comparable pre-computation

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Valuation API — property lookup, comparable analysis, AVM scoring, neighborhood profiling, appraisal report generation, client portal backend

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: MLS API credentials, public records API keys, encryption keys for financial data, appraiser authentication secrets

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Valuation accuracy tracking, comparable search quality, model prediction drift, API latency, appraisal report generation time

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine property description generation and data formatting, reserve GPT-4o for complex comparable analysis narratives and appraisal report sections — saves 60% on AI costs
Pre-compute comparable property sets nightly via Functions — avoids expensive real-time AI Search queries during business hours when most valuations are requested
Cache neighborhood scores with 7-day TTL — neighborhood metrics (crime, schools, amenities) change infrequently and repeated queries for nearby properties return similar results
Use AI Search geo-spatial filtering to narrow comparable candidates before semantic ranking — reduces the number of documents semantically scored by 80%
Batch AVM model scoring for portfolio valuations — bulk inference endpoints cost 60% less than individual real-time predictions for lender portfolio reviews
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
